query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `updates` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
  `title` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  `content` TEXT NOT NULL,
  `type` ENUM('update', 'article', 'announcement') NOT NULL,
  `createdBy` INT NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  `updatedAt` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `update_images` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
  `updateId` INT NOT NULL,
  `imageUrl` VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX `update_idx` (`updateId`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `update_reads` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
  `updateId` INT NOT NULL,
  `userId` INT NOT NULL,
  `readAt` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX `update_user_idx` (`updateId`, `userId`)
);
